name: temitope-olaitan-portfolio
description: Portfolio of Temitope Olaitan - Software Engineer & AI Builder

scripts.build: npm run prebuild:data && npm run stage:sports-db-cdn && npm run build:games && astro build && node scripts/stage-sportverse-data-to-dist.mjs
scripts.build:skip-data: npm run build:games && astro build && node scripts/stage-sportverse-data-to-dist.mjs
scripts.test:projects: npm run test --prefix projects/kobo && npm run test --prefix projects/tatafo && npm run test --prefix projects/pulse && npm run test --prefix projects/ayo-master && npm run test --prefix projects/naija-utils
